headlines.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq rise after June jobs report falls short
Changpeng Zhao Forecasts Bitcoin’s Price Will Reach $1 Million
Nvidia Partners With 'Neoclouds' Sharon AI, Firmus Technologies
Google, Disney Intellectual Property Licensing Partner Teases Breakout. Top Funds Buy In.
Stock Market Today: Dow Climbs As Oil Dips Again; Tesla Slides But This Airline Outperforms (Live Coverage)
Forget Nvidia: Is Google Quietly About to Steal the Crown as the World’s Most Valuable Company?
Microsoft Frontier Company launches with 6,000 engineers, $2.5B
Central Banks Are Dumping Treasuries for Gold. Should Gold ETF Investors Follow, or Get Played?
Citi sends warning on semiconductor and hyperscaler stocks
Hormuz relief may not ease the economic toll that's already 'baked in,' analysts warn
headlines.desc: Early signs of reopening of the Strait of Hormuz have lifted the most acute threat to global energy supplies but economic damages from the war will take months to unwind.

headlines.title: UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation plan after first vessel attack under peace deal
headlines.desc: The pause follows a container ship being struck near the coast of Oman on Thursday, with a U.S. official saying that Iran was responsible for the attack.

headlines.title: Shipping rebounds in Strait of Hormuz one week after U.S.-Iran deal – but fragile confidence threatens recovery
headlines.desc: Shipping traffic through the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz is recovering one week after the U.S. and Iran signed an interim peace deal.

headlines.title: Three key AI stocks to watch this week with traders expecting giant moves
headlines.desc: Micron and Cerebras report this week. Also there's heavy options activity in Super Micro.

headlines.title: Nvidia's stock struggles as Kalshi traders bet chip prices are coming down
headlines.desc: Shares of Nvidia have been faltering recently — and Kalshi traders predict that what the company can charge for chips is also declining.

headlines.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
headlines.desc: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.

headlines.title: Micron's monster post-earnings rally is almost gone. Traders divided on where it goes next
headlines.desc: The maker of memory chips slid to start the week, marking an about-face from its post-earnings surge.

headlines.title: Jeremy Grantham says, 'This is the most expensive market in American history'
headlines.desc: Jeremy Grantham says soaring valuations around AI makes the U.S. stock market historically expensive.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
headlines.desc: TipRanks discusses three dividend-paying stocks.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are bullish on these 3 stocks for strong long-term growth potential
headlines.desc: Amid volatility in global markets, top analysts can help investors look past near-term noise and pick attractive stocks with long-term potential.

headlines.title: World Cup could boost the June jobs report by 40,000, Goldman estimates
headlines.desc: Nonfarm payrolls are projected to post a gain of 115,000, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

headlines.title: This fund manager bought Nvidia and SK Hynix and sold software before others. His simple message on AI: ‘Follow the money.’
headlines.desc: Blue Whale Growth Fund manager exited software stocks before many others did.

headlines.title: Opening a ‘Trump account’ for your children? Here is the risk you need to reckon with first.
headlines.desc: The new accounts ban bonds and international stocks, forcing parents to bet their children’s financial future entirely on U.S. equities.

headlines.title: Nvidia is betting on a trillion-dollar robotics boom. Here is the hidden way to trade it.
headlines.desc: CEO Jensen Huang has called humanoid robots a “multitrillion-dollar economic opportunity.”

headlines.title: With Hormuz reopened, has the oil shortage turned into a glut?
headlines.desc: As flow resumes through the strait, an oil surplus may yet again destabilise global energy markets.

headlines.title: Who is Iranian oil tycoon Shamkhani whose ship is stranded in Hormuz?
headlines.desc: Iranian oil shipping magnate Mohammad Hossein Shamkhani has been sanctioned by the West over his shadow fleet.

headlines.title: Wholesale prices rose 1.1% in May, more than expected, on surge in energy
headlines.desc: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.7% in May, according to the Dow Jones consensus forecast.

headlines.title: Why the oil may start flowing through the Strait of Hormuz faster than many believe
headlines.desc: Brian Sullivan's direct conversations with industry executives and experts based both here and in the Middle East indicate ships will start steaming.

headlines.title: 'Passive' investors who dodged bitcoin are now forced to own SpaceX, which is three times more volatile
headlines.desc: Many advisors and money-managers invested in index funds who will soon be owners of Elon Musk's astronomic ambitions

headlines.title: Kalshi traders see greater than 50% odds the Fed will hike rates this year
headlines.desc: The Federal Reserve suggested higher rates could be in the cards, and traders on Kalshi see growing odds of a hike in 2026.

headlines.title: Here are the five big takeaways from Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed chairman
headlines.desc: The Federal Reserve and Chairman Kevin Warsh on Wednesday followed the script on interest rates closely.
